channel.title: FTP on yexca'Blog
channel.description: Recent content in FTP on yexca'Blog

item.title: Remove Windows Network Addresses (FTP) from Quick Access
item.description:
📢 This article was translated by gemini-2.5-flash

No direct fix, but you can clear all custom Quick Access entries (resets to default).

Go to C:\\Users\\YourUsername\\AppData\\Roaming\\Microsoft\\Windows\\Recent\\AutomaticDestinations. Back up all files in that folder, then nuke ’em.

References

FTP address cannot be removed from Quick Access, other folders can – Microsoft Community
